ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Accesi in 1691. See Bergamini, `Dai Gelati alla Renia (1670-1698). Appunti per una storia delle accademie letterarie bolognesi`, in La Colonia Renia: profilo documentario e critico dell’Arcadia bolognese, ed. Mario Saccenti 2 vols (Modena: 1988). Two of his letters (both dated 1692) were addressed to `N. N. Accademico Acceso (Domenico Bernardoni?)`, and to `Accademici Accesi`. See Muratori, Epistolario (1901), vol. 1 1691-98, pp.8-9.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
